spec.rawSql:
SELECT
      cc.created_at::date AS datetime,
      ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sc.key = 'reliability'            THEN cc.value END)::numeric, 3) AS
  reliability,
      ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sc.key = 'maintainability'        THEN cc.value END)::numeric, 3) AS
  maintainability,
      ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sc.key = 'functional_suitability' THEN cc.value END)::numeric, 3) AS
  functional_suitability
  FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc
  JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc ON sc.id = cc.characteristic_id
  WHERE cc.repository_id = ${repository}
    AND (
      CASE
        WHEN '${date_from}' != '' AND '${date_to}' != '' THEN
          cc.created_at::date BETWEEN '${date_from}'::date AND '${date_to}'::date
        WHEN '${date_from}' != '' THEN
          cc.created_at::date >= '${date_from}'::date
        WHEN '${date_to}' != '' THEN
          cc.created_at::date <= '${date_to}'::date
        ELSE TRUE
      END
    )
  GROUP BY cc.created_at::date
  ORDER BY cc.created_at::date

SELECT
      rel.release_name,
      rel.start_at::date AS release_date
  FROM releases rel
  JOIN organizations_repository repo ON repo.product_id = rel.product_id
  WHERE repo.id = ${repository}
    AND rel.start_at::date >= (
      SELECT MIN(cc.created_at::date)
      FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc
      WHERE cc.repository_id = ${repository}
    )
    AND rel.start_at::date <= (
      SELECT MAX(cc.created_at::date)
      FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc
      WHERE cc.repository_id = ${repository}
    )
  ORDER BY rel.start_at

spec.__legacyStringValue: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM organizations_repository ORDER BY name
